verses.1: Remember, LORD, what has come on us.
verses.2: Our inheritance has been turned over to strangers,
verses.4: We must pay for water to drink.
verses.5: Our pursuers are on our necks.
verses.6: We have given our hands to the Egyptians,
verses.7: Our fathers sinned, and are no more.
verses.9: We get our bread at the peril of our lives,
verses.10: Our skin is black like an oven,
verses.11: They ravished the women in Zion,
verses.12: Princes were hanged up by their hands.
verses.14: The elders have ceased from the gate,
verses.15: The joy of our heart has ceased.
verses.16: The crown has fallen from our head.
verses.17: For this our heart is faint.
verses.18: for the mountain of Zion, which is desolate.
verses.20: Why do you forget us forever,
verses.21: Turn us to yourself, LORD, and we will be turned.
verses.22: But you have utterly rejected us.
